eval_method: self_critique_with_kpi_checklist (same method as run_01_eval.json for fair before/after comparison)

answer_correctness.note: Same 5 findings + new forecast-horizon summary table; numbers verified against extracted page text.

citation_accuracy.note: All 5 citations now carry table_id/chart_id (F-TABLE-001 fixed). Section headings still include one generic ('Executive Summaries' p.28) but table_id compensates. 0.92 > 0.90 threshold.

evidence_sufficiency.note: Same evidence set; horizon table adds a self-contained summary that improves reader sufficiency.

material_claim_evidence_coverage.note: Now 10/10 material claims have direct support; the '27% correction' figure is now co-located with the USD 611 decline in one citation block.

hallucination_risk.note: Forecast-period labeling removes the conflation risk that was the marginal hallucination source.

abstention_quality.note: F-ABSTAIN-001 explicitly deferred to human review (output-schema change). Not in scope this session.

numeric_accuracy.note: Numbers re-verified; canonical spacing enforced ('USD 6,900' not 'USD6,900').

table_handling.note: 5/5 chart/table-page citations now carry table_id/chart_id (F-TABLE-001 fixed). Still below 0.90 because the skill does not yet extract structured cell data from the 42 tables (that would need ExtractTable module wiring — out of scope for minimal text patch). Major improvement nonetheless.

table_cell_accuracy.note: Still no cells extracted; ExtractTable module wiring is a code change, not a policy patch.

terminology_consistency.note: Now consistently distinguishes 'target' vs 'forecast range' vs 'probability range' — terminology is sharper.

regression_pass_rate.note: scaffolding/tests/ 7/7 pass; eval_runner DoD 5/5 pass — patches did not break existing fixtures.

forecast_period_disclosure.note: F-FORECAST-001 fixed. 5/5 forecast numbers now declare type + horizon; summary table at top makes horizons non-confusable.

primary_failures_deferred: F-ABSTAIN-001 (needs human review — output schema change)
